reviews.text: Our stay at the inn was magnificent! Bill and Beverly were wonderful hosts and great folks to talk to.
Great hosts.

We really enjoyed the Rose room. The breakfasts were awesome, Bill and Beverly were great. It was a great getaway and one we'll do again. Why stay in a hotel when you can have this wonderful experience. We'll do it again for sure! Ron and Sue

awesome service, great staff, don't forget to tip!

service is always superb!!!!

Door didn't even lock, musty-wet smell, flies/knats in the room, stains on the sheets, in the shower and on the towels, couldn't even stay the night Hotels.com had me pay in advance for the room so i was still charged for a truely horrible and disgusting experience!
Awful!
Horrible, some employee went into my room while I was at the doctor and trashed it . Worst place that I ever stood at!
Everything is terrible!!!

Imposible quedarse en un hotel de paso y con historial de inseguridad por crímenes ahí cometidos etc etc. Estoy en proceso de que Expedía me rembolse. Es una vergüenza para Expedía tener como opción este terrible hotel. Nos causó muchos gastos extras y contratiempos
Worst place I have ever been. That hotel should be demolished!
Absolutely Horrible!
I was very disappointed and I was disappointed that Expedia would even list it on their website

Very dirty Place was run down, Room were very dirty,
It was terrible. Would never stayhere agian. So bad i didnt even go back for my 2nd night. Worst place i have ever staid at. Very nasty needs o be closed down

Bastante deficiente o atendimento no caf da manha, especificamente num cafe da manha, que haviamos solicitado atenao especial por estar na mesa um Ministro e uma Vice Ministra do Paraguai. Tive que me levantar da mesa para solicitar caf e suco de laranja. O garon servia o cafe em todas as mesas !! Pedi um taxi (9:00 hs) na recepao e a informaao que recebi que tardaria minimo 1/2 hora. Depois constatei que eu era o 6 de uma lista de pessoas aguardando um taxi. Como tinha urgencia, pedi que chamas

Atendimente Excelente, o hotel apesar de antigo bem mantido, est sempre se atualizando. Ficamos em um apartamente que teve o banheiro reformado e realmente ficou muito bom. A localizao privilegiada, no bairro Batel, a 100 metros do Hard Rock Caf e do Shopping Cristal e Curitiba. Por fim o melhor hotel da Rede Accor em Curitiba, muito bem administrado, os funcionarios fazem o possivel e o impossivel para prestarem o melhor atendimento.
tima opo na cidade, principalmente pela localizao.
Me hospedo neste hotel todo ms, muito bom. Voltarei sempre.
Personnel trs agrable. Environnement calme.Petit djeuner un peu banal.

pas a la hauteur du prix. une chambre ou il fait froid en entrant, une salle de bain ou il fait encore plus froid, une clim reversible qui est pourtant deja poussee a son maximum et q u il me faut eteindre pour esperer dormir vu le bruit. une tache sur le drap, mais surtout le vrai point qui m a gene: une cuvette des toilettes avec plein de traces de liquide sec... pas du tout ragoutant. le petit dejeuner etait lui classique et honnete, le pain au chocolat bien chaud. 131 euros pour ca, honnetem
Bluffant!
Catastrophique : pas sonoris, plus entretenu, sale... n'y allez pas !
